text.title: ICP Message Mining from AI Conversations Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid ICP Message Mining from AI Conversations output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: support + sales + agent logs + consent basis
JTBD phrase, objection, success quote, churn, competitor

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: transcript_sources populated with a typed value
extraction_taxonomy populated with a typed value
monthly_synthesis populated with a typed value
copy_changes_made populated with a typed value
redaction_policy populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
